bead.title: review: Frontend ReviewPanel + active-reviews indicator + artifact-changed banner
bead.description: ReviewPanel component on artifact detail view. Active-reviews indicator (no reviewer dropdown — codex cut). Artifact-changed banner if artifact is mutated mid-review (sha drift).
bead.acceptance: 1. ReviewPanel renders + handles streaming deltas. 2. Active-reviews indicator visible. 3. Drift banner triggers on sha mismatch. 4. Component tests pass.

events.body: {"decision":"warn","decision_source":"pre_claim_intake","detail":"component location specified: Bead names a 'ReviewPanel component on artifact detail view' but provides no file paths, no SvelteKit route/component locations, no GraphQL query/subscription names to wire to, and no test function names. AC #1 references 'streaming deltas' without specifying the subscription source (presumably the reviewSession events subscription from ddx-de278b8d, but not stated). AC #2 'Active-reviews indicator visible' has no acceptance signal — visible where, driven by what query. AC #3 'sha mismatch' does not name which sha field or where it is observed. AC #4 'Component tests pass' does not name Test* functions or test files. Frontend is SvelteKit + Houdini GraphQL (per CLAUDE.md), but the bead does not point to cli/internal/server/frontend paths. A sub-agent reading this cold cannot pick files to edit without operator guidance.","fingerprint":"4a4c61c4c495026c402b5fc3d74cf2535cc4223730d9e55d287891592f499c0c","policy_mode":"warn-only","reason":"readiness_best_effort","rule_id":"pre_claim_intake.readiness_best_effort","suggested_action":"revise the rewrite so it preserves every explicit commitment"}
